/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/turing4.dir/turing4_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turing4.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turing4.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turing4.dir/turingmachine.cpp.o -o turing4  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
